name: Fusion 360
description: Fusion 360 is a useful design surface inside Mechanical Engineering.
whyUseIt: People in Mechanical Engineering use Fusion 360 to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using Fusion 360 as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from Fusion 360.
